title: Origins Deities
description: An Origins addon, adding two additional layers for Deities (an active power) & their aspects (a passive power)
body:
# Origin Deities

Originally made for a private server, this mod adds **9 deities** and **14 aspects** to choose from each granting different powers.

These origins are built with usage in multiplayer in mind but may work in single-player as well.

## Layers

The primary layer in this is the **Diety**, each deity has a set of unique (possibly active) powers. The secondary layer is **Aspect** which is shared between multiple deities and grants passive powers. 

## What are these deities?

I made them up for my world-building, though most are based on real deities to a greater or lesser degree.
